name: Zarbag's Gitz
inspire: Each time you gain a sixth or subsequent Glory point, Inspire a friendly fighter.

reactions.name: Slippery Gitz
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after you pick a friendly fighter to Move.
reactions.flavorText: Grots are hard to pin down at the best of times - and Zarbag's Gitz especially so.
reactions.rulesText: Pick a friendly Grot ({icon:minion}) with no Move or Charge tokens adjacent to them. After the first fighter Moves, that friendly Grot ({icon:minion}) can Move. You can only use this ability once per turn.

reactions.name: Fungal Burst
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after a friendly Grot ({icon:minion}) is slain by an attacker adjacent to them.
reactions.flavorText: Grots often carry bunches of mushrooms that, when struck, release clouds of poisonous spores.
reactions.rulesText: Give the attacker a Stagger token. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Squig Herder
abilities.rulesText: After you deploy a friendly Drizgit, you must immediately place each friendly Squig ({icon:minion}) in an empty hex adjacent to them that is not a starting hex and that does not contain a feature token.

abilities.name: Spinnin'
abilities.rulesText:
Snirk cannot be given Guard tokens.
Each time a fighter is placed in, is pushed into or enters a hex adjacent to a friendly Snirk, inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

abilities.name: Volley
abilities.rulesText:
If a friendly fighter's weapon has the {icon:volley} runemark, you have access to the following Weapon ability:

Volley ({icon:volley}): Immediately after the Attack, if it was successful, you can pick another friendly fighter whose weapon has Volley ({icon:volley}). That fighter Attacks with that weapon. You can only use this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Gang Up
abilities.flavorText: Zarbag's Gitz have heard about fighting fair. They just choose not to.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. In the next turn, friendly fighters' melee weapons have +1 Attack dice for each other friendly Grot ({icon:minion}) adjacent to the target. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Make Some Noise!
abilities.flavorText: There are few better ways to rile up a squig than making a racket.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Push each friendly Squig ({icon:minion}) up to 2 hexes. For the rest of the battle round, those Squigs ({icon:minion}) cannot hold treasure tokens or Delve. You can only use this ability once per game.
